name: cjdns
encryption: Curve25519 + Salsa20 per-link, IPv6 derived from public key
governance: Open source, small core team (Hyperboria community)
summary: Encrypted IPv6 mesh where addresses are hashes of public keys. Source-routed labels, not flat IP.
why: Demonstrate an internet where addressing is cryptographically self-validating — no CAs, no hijack risk.
tradeoffs: Niche. Source routing limits scale. Maintenance has been spotty.
